codeReview.summary: Both installation.md and quick-start.md exist with complete content covering all required aspects. installation.md documents three installation methods (bunx, prebuilt binary for Linux/macOS/Windows, building from source). quick-start.md provides step-by-step setup guide including server startup, URL access, and a security defaults table.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff and features.json claim commit 5bee101 created the getting-started pages, but git history shows the files were actually created in commit 8cfb275 (labeled 'fix: WebGL renderer') and 5bee101 only modified them. The same author created both commits minutes apart. This creates confusion about which work belongs to which feature/worker session.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git log shows docs/getting-started/installation.md and quick-start.md were added in 8cfb275, but feature's completedWorkerSessionId is 5bee101 which only modified those files. Handoff salienSummary claims 'Created Getting Started documentation pages' but git diff 5bee101 only shows M (modification), not A (add).

summary: Feature implementation passes review. Both docs/getting-started/installation.md and docs/getting-started/quick-start.md exist with complete, accurate content. Installation page covers bunx, prebuilt binary (Linux/macOS/Windows), and source build methods. Quick-start page covers server startup, URL access, TOTP auth, and security defaults table. Build verified with exit code 0. One shared state observation: handoff attribution may be misaligned with git commit history.
